name: rpg-agent-mv
description: RPG Maker MV indexing and patching tools for agent workflows.
author: RPG-Agent-MV contributors

scripts.install:deps: npm install --ignore-scripts && npm --prefix src/backend install && npm --prefix src/ui/desktop install
scripts.check:local: npm run install:deps && npm run build:opencode-runtime && npm test && node -e "const cp=require('node:child_process'); const path=require('node:path'); const bin=path.join('runtime','out','opencode','windows-x64','opencode.exe'); cp.execFileSync(bin, ['--version'], {stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.release:electron: npm run build:opencode-runtime && npm --prefix src/ui/desktop run package --
